title: timestamp add integer
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test1(i INTEGER, d TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test1(i, d) VALUES (1, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE TABLE test2(i INTERVAL DAY TO SECOND, d TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test2(i, d) VALUES (INTERVAL '1' DAY, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
SELECT d, d + i FROM test1 JOIN test2 ON test1.i = 1;
